title: gomphrena perennis var. suffruticosa
intro: Gomphrena perennis var. suffruticosa, commonly known as the small globe amaranth, is a perennial plant species in the amaranth family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, due to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Gomphrena perennis var. suffruticosa include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antiviral activities. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or dried extracts for various uses, including medicinal and dietary purposes.
